The current Prime Minister of Canada in 2026 is Mark Carney, who took office on March 14, 2025. He is Canada's 24th Prime Minister and was elected Leader of the Liberal Party of Canada before being sworn in.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
